reforms.description: A new Innovation and Technology Fund has been established to provide special incentives for research and development, innovation, and environmental protection, shifting from general subsidies to more targeted actions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to incentivize R&D and innovation, which are expected to enhance productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The fund has been established and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the fund represents a significant shift in policy towards targeted innovation support.
reforms.source_quote: To facilitate the selection of projects, a new Innovation and Technology Fund has been set up.

reforms.description: The Government has started to address regulatory problems by reforming the regulatory process, with the Federal Chancellery responsible for introducing and coordinating changes to improve the economic impacts of regulation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The impact of regulatory reform on economic growth is uncertain and may vary depending on implementation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been announced but is not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: While the reform addresses important regulatory issues, it does not represent a major structural change.
reforms.source_quote: The Government has started to address some of these problems by reforming the regulatory process.
